texto: Conversations were struck up between strangers, regular diners as well as infrequent customers, as if united by a sense of gratitude at the sheer unlikeliness of it all - a high achievement of industrial civilisation that deserved to remain for everyone, but which has now gone the way of the airship and the ocean liner. Much of the nostalgia concerning railways is partial, even false; not this.[On British railway dining cars]
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Simon Bradley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sucesso. O trecho “Conversations were struck up between strangers, regular diners as well as infrequent customers, a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, catering, civilisation pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de civilisation e dining.
